title: Teamwork session
content:
Hi everyone, 


By popular request, we will have a teamwork session tomorrow. Bring your laptops to work with your teams. I will be around to provide feedback and answer questions.


I will update the syllabus and assignments accordingly.


See you tomorrow,
Sina
